subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I have indeed read thy letter with its wondrous meanings [3.5s]... O thou who art attracted by the Fragrances of God! I have read thy beautiful letter containing beautiful significances
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قد قرات نمیقتک البدیعه المعانی
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies, @interpretation of dreams and visions
